meaning: Knight Commander (of the Order) of the Bath (英国)(第二等的)高级巴思勋爵士
examples: KCB gear pump are mainly gear, shaft, pump body, valve, shaft end seal.
KCB-300 ~ 960 type pump adopts mechanical device, bearing the single cut to the heart ball bearings.
Sir Nicholas MacPherson KCB, permanent secretary, HM Treasury and Sharon White, director general public services , HM Treasury.
Or Admiral Sir Horatio Hornblower KG, KCB, RN.
